title: aquilegia hirsutissima var. montsicciana
intro: Aquilegia hirsutissima var. montsicciana, commonly known as the Rocky Mountain Columbine or Monticola's Columbine, is a plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and fight off infections. The herbal preparations of Aquilegia hirsutissima var. montsicciana typically involve infusions of the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots, which can be consumed as teas or used in tinctures and salves.
